name: UPYun
description: Chinese CDN and cloud storage provider (又拍云) focused on media acceleration, edge computing, image/video processing.

seo.title: UPYun — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: UPYun: Chinese CDN and cloud storage provider (又拍云) focused on media acceleration, edge computing, image/video processing.

when_to_use: Chinese CDN and media processing for image and video acceleration
Object storage with CDN for Chinese media and content companies
Edge computing and image transformation at Chinese PoPs
Video transcoding and streaming CDN for Chinese platforms
Cost-effective Chinese CDN alternative for media-heavy apps

pros: Strong image and video processing in China
Edge compute offering for media workloads
cons: Smaller than Alibaba or Tencent Cloud rivals
review.verdict: Solid media-focused cloud in China, impractical for foreign teams without a local entity or Chinese-speaking ops.
review.best_for: Media and content platforms operating inside China with local ICP and entity
review.not_for: Global-first teams without Chinese entity or Mandarin-capable operations
